nodes.body: Could you add some assertion steps? All of these step starters are 'And'. One of the 'wait to see text' steps in 97 - 99 should start with a 'Then'. Probably the first one on 97.

Done

Author: ddl-abishek <abishek.subramanian@dominodatalab.com>
Date:   Mon Mar 18 17:18:57 2024 -0400

    typo fix

Also no assertion steps in this test. Clicking a button doesn't make sense as an assertion step, that's more of a 'When' type progression step. Add some assertions for when you expect to see certain text, I think line 39 makes sense as a 'Then' step, also line 42 as well.

So I followed your convention of cucu steps I modified the steps based on this commit commit e0d4e356371a17bc363ebd6bf87aefdd7129564d (HEAD -> QE-15286, origin/QE-15286) Author: ddl-abishek Date: Mon Mar 18 17:28:44 2024 -0400 checking whether data source is actually deleted
